characterDiversityPolicy.positiveConstraint: Each new 10-character batch must read as a crew of different adult professionals, not one model in different outfits. Across every batch, use unique diversity signatures and vary gender presentation, age impression, face construction, skin tone, hair, body silhouette, posture, expression, camera angle, hand gesture, and tool interaction. Repeating a slot profile across batches is invalid.
posePalette: leaning into sea wind while checking a strapped tablet
kneeling at an open deck equipment case
walking diagonally across wet grating with a heavy tool bag
half-turned while signaling to an unseen deck crew
bracing one boot on a low step beside a railing
squatting to connect a sensor cable near a junction box
standing side-on while reading a laminated work permit
reaching upward to inspect a safety line carabiner
turning away from the camera while looking back over shoulder
wide balanced stance while holding a torque tool across the body
seated on a service crate while calibrating a handheld instrument
one hand gripping rail, the other pointing toward turbine nacelle
low crouch beside coiled cable and portable analyzer
stepping from vessel gangway onto turbine platform
arms close to body while shielding a radio from spray
profile stance with clipboard tucked under one arm
qaChecklist: Confirm the batch is not all female-presenting and no more than five are feminine-presenting.
Confirm faces are not reused with only PPE or background changes.
Confirm no diversityProfile signature is repeated across pending batches.
Confirm at least eight distinct pose silhouettes and at least six camera angles within each 10-image batch.
Confirm hairstyle, expression, face shape, body type, hand gesture, and tool interaction vary across the batch.
Confirm every character remains an adult professional in credible PPE.
